manual.title: Gumax RF — manual
manual.description: Connect the Gumax RF integration to your ESPHome CC1101 bridge.

data_description.esphome_node: Select a detected 433 MHz capable ESPHome node, or type a custom name. Hyphens are automatically converted to underscores.
data_description.device_id: 32-bit device ID in hex (e.g. A1B2C3D4). Must match the ID the motors are paired to.

learn.title: Gumax RF — learn from remote
learn.description: Select the ESPHome node and click Next. You will then have 10 seconds to press a button on your remote.

data_description.esphome_node: Select the 433 MHz capable ESPHome node that will receive the signal.

learn_wait.title: Waiting for signal…
learn_wait.description:
**{remaining}** seconds remaining

Press any button on your Gumax remote.

Captured device IDs:
{log}

data_description.device_id: Select a captured ID or type one manually.

prefix.title: Channel name prefix
prefix.description:
Set a prefix for channel names (max. 12 characters). CC always stays CC.

Channel 1 will be named: **{example}**

data_description.channel_prefix: E.g. 'C' → C1, C2 … or 'Screen' → Screen1, Screen2 …

error.invalid_device_id: Invalid hex value (max 8 characters, e.g. A1B2C3D4)
error.no_signal_received: No signal received within 10 seconds. Please try again.
error.decode_failed: Signal received but could not recognise the device ID. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This device ID is already configured.
abort.no_esphome_nodes: No ESPHome node with 433 MHz support found. Make sure your CC1101 bridge is online and try again.

configure_prefix.title: Channel name prefix
configure_prefix.description:
Set a custom prefix for channel names (max. 12 characters). CC always stays CC.

Channel 1 will be named: **{example}**

data_description.channel_prefix: E.g. 'C' → C1, C2 … or 'Screen' → Screen1, Screen2 …

view_codes.title: View raw pulse timings
view_codes.description: Select a channel to view the raw pulse timings for all commands.

error.invalid_prefix_too_long: Prefix may be at most 12 characters.
